_comment: Chart/data sources and exclusion references. See PLAN.md §2, §10.2.

us_billboard.note: Billboard Hot 100 weekly data (1958+); aggregated into year-end points per year.

uk_official.note: officialcharts.com — returns a Cloudflare JS challenge (403) from some networks; best-effort, degrades to 0 rows on failure.

de_germancharts.note: Same Hung Medien chart engine as austriancharts.at (offiziellecharts.de blocks scraping with an Akamai WAF). Confirmed table layout: table.charts, cols [rank, _, artist a, title a].

at_austriancharts.note: Ö3 / Austria Top 40 year-end by year. Confirmed reachable with UA + Accept-Language + Referer headers (plain 403 otherwise).

deezer.note: Free, no auth. Year/metadata/genre + track duration for chorus offset.

exclusions._comment: PRIMARY = scrape hitster.store DE. Spotify playlist IDs kept for reference only (Web API frozen for new apps).
